source_file_used: app/data/tables/cell_species_records.json; derived from data/gbif_grid_joined.parquet because no local parquet reader was available in this runtime
repeated_year_explanation: Several species can share the same last record year when they come from the same collecting event, survey period or GBIF batch. Years shown here are species-level summaries.
species_level_year_logic: build_cell_species_records.py groups records by (cell_id, species_key), appends parsed years for each group, then writes first_year=min(years), last_year=max(years), years_silent=2026-last_year.

source_metadata.limitation: If no kingdom field was available, records were not filtered by kingdom in this script. No species, red-list category, endemism value or GBIF DOI was invented.

taxon_scope.expected_scope: Tracheophyta / vascular plants from source GBIF DOI filter
taxon_scope.kingdom_filter_note: No additional kingdom filter was applied by the lightweight-table script when kingdom was absent.
taxon_scope.scope_note: The source GBIF download was filtered to Tracheophyta. The lightweight browser table is treated as vascular-plant occurrence evidence. No additional kingdom filter was applied by the lightweight-table script when kingdom was absent.
